description_long: This is a medium-height, vertical slat fence panel constructed from evenly spaced, rectangular boards with a smooth, uniform finish. The front side features seven vertical slats, each with a flat top, supported by two wider posts at either end. The rear side reveals two horizontal rails that connect and stabilize the vertical slats, providing structural integrity. The color is a consistent beige or light tan, giving it a neutral, modern appearance suitable for urban or residential settings. The top edge of the slats is mostly flat, but the slats are cut to slightly different heights, creating a subtle alternating pattern. There are no visible decorative elements, post caps, or gate mechanisms, emphasizing a simple, functional design.
description: A beige, vertical slat fence panel with flat-topped boards and two horizontal support rails, featuring a simple, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing seven evenly spaced vertical slats with flat tops and two wider posts at the ends.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the fence and the depth of the vertical slats and posts.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying two horizontal rails connecting the vertical slats and the posts, with all structural elements visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the slim profile and alignment of the slats and posts.
